question: What heat treatment does A789 require for S31803?

chunks.document: ASTM A789 Seamless & Welded Duplex Tubing For General Service 2014.pdf
ASTM A789 Seamless & Welded Duplex Stainless Steel Tubing 2013.pdf

chunks.content: specification shall conform to the applicable requirements of Specification A1016/ A1016M, unless otherwise provided herein.
chunks.document: ASTM A789 Seamless & Welded Duplex Tubing For General Service 2014.pdf

chunks.content: 9.5 When more than one heat is involved, the tension, flaring, flanging, and hardness test requirements shall apply to each heat.
chunks.document: ASTM A789 Seamless & Welded Duplex Stainless Steel Tubing 2013.pdf

response_preview:
**Answer:** The heat treatment required for S31803 by A789 is "1870–2010 [1020–1100] rapid cooling in air or water" [1].

**Details:** This heat treatment is specified in Table 2 of the ASTM A789 spec
